title: Washington Times: 김정은, 왕이에게 '다극화 세계' 지지·하나의 중국 원칙 지지 표명
snippet: Kim Jong Un voiced support for China's push to build a 'multipolar world' and called for deeper ties between the traditional allies. Kim said his government will fully support Chinese efforts to achieve territorial integrity based on its 'one-China principle'. Wang said the countries' relations were entering a 'new phase' following a summit last year between Kim and Xi Jinping.
tag_reason: 왕이-김정은 회담의 구체적 내용(다극화 세계, 하나의 중국 원칙)을 다룬 영문 보도. 이전 소스에 없음.
